title: Drodi's Shield
description: A new fancy shield with built in quality of life features.
body:
**I hate the vanilla shield : It's ugly, blocks your FOV, and it's very annoying to have it in your offhand when not using it. Luckily, with ressource pack magic, we can make all those problems go away.**

The shield now has a refurbished look with a much better texture, and a few changes to it's model 
>When holding it in your off hand in first person, it doesn't render 
> 
> While blocking it takes up almost none of your FOV
> 
> This new model is taken from [_Faithless_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless) by [Stich](https://modrinth.com/user/StitchSprites) (with permission)


<details>
<summary>OFFICIAL SOURCES</summary>


The OFFICIAL versions of my packs are available here on Modrinth under the profile [@Drodi](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi) and on Planet Minecraft under the profile [Drodi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/). Any other source may contain viruses or malwares, so if you want to download from other sites, do so at your own risk.

If you believe someone else is reuploading my Ressource packs on other sources and action is possible, please contact me on discord (drodi99) or on my discord server ([https://discord.gg/8tjPGqtT](https://discord.gg/8tjPGqtT))

</details>
